name: Gumbo II
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry fresh okra in oil until golden brown.
2. Add oleo and flour to the pan. Stir constantly to form a roux.
3. Add onion, celery, bell pepper, and garlic. Cook until vegetables are softened.
4. Pour in water and Worcestershire sauce. Bring mixture to a simmer.
5. Add tomatoes and cook for 1-2 hours.
6. Incorporate meat of your choice (shrimp, chicken, or crawfish) into the pot.
7. Allow the gumbo to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Serve over rice.
